unauthorized.description: You need to sign in to access this page

notFound.title: Page Not Found
notFound.description: The requested page does not exist or has been removed

serverError.title: Server Error

default.title: An Error Occurred

errors.team_size_schedule_pairing: Team size and team-formation dates must be set together, or both left empty

home.title: DreamTeams
home.heroTitle: Browse competitions, publish events, and manage applications in one place.
home.heroDescription: DreamTeams currently helps organizers publish competitions with custom application forms and review incoming applications, while participants can browse the catalog and apply from their profile.
home.ctaText: Competition discovery and organizer workflows in one place

about.title: About the Platform
about.description: DreamTeams is an IT competition platform focused on the workflows that already work today: a public competition catalog, participant applications, organizer competition management, and application review.

home.featuresDescription: Current product capabilities for participants and organizers

organizers.title: Launch competitions and manage the applicant flow
organizers.description: From creating a competition to selecting participants, the core organizer workflow lives in one workspace.

participants.title: Find events quickly and apply with less friction
participants.description: Participants can discover competitions, complete their profile, and submit applications through a cleaner flow.

catalog.title: Competition catalog
catalog.description: Published competitions are visible in the public listing with schedule, domains, participant limits, and event details.

forms.title: Application forms
forms.description: Organizers can configure a custom application form per competition and participants submit responses together with selected domains.

review.title: Application review
review.description: Incoming applications can be filtered, opened, accepted, and rejected from the organizer dashboard.

export.title: CSV export
export.description: Organizers can export competition applications by status for offline processing and reporting.

roadmap.title: Roadmap
roadmap.description: Next product milestones already planned for the platform

teamFormation.title: Team formation
teamFormation.description: Participant matching, team invitations, and team membership flows inside the platform.

submissions.title: Project submissions
submissions.description: Competition-specific submission flow for links, files, and delivery metadata.

winnerElection.title: Winner team election
winnerElection.description: Organizer tools for evaluating finalists and recording winning teams.

cta.title: Use the live workflows
cta.description: Browse active competitions or set up your organizer profile and publish the next event.

aggregator.title: Public competition catalog
aggregator.description: Anyone can browse published competitions and open detailed event pages before signing in.

participants.title: Participant onboarding
participants.description: Participants create a profile, select domains, and submit applications to competitions that match them.

submissions.title: Application submission
submissions.description: Participants apply to competitions with selected domains and answers collected through the organizer's form.

organizers.title: Organizer workspace
organizers.description: Organizers can create competitions, edit details, configure application forms, and manage incoming applications.

forms.title: Flexible application forms
forms.description: Each competition can have its own form with the questions and answer options the organizer needs.

applications.title: Application review and export
applications.description: Review participant details, accept or reject applications, and export applicant lists to CSV by status.

adminInfo.title: Administrator account
adminInfo.description: You are signed in as a platform administrator. Manage invites and system settings via the admin panel.

delete.title: You are about to delete your profile
delete.description: ATTENTION!! All your data, as well as all your activity on the platform, will be permanently deleted WITHOUT the possibility of recovery

notRegistered.title: You're not registered yet
notRegistered.description: Register as a participant to join competitions, or as an organizer to publish events

registered.title: You're registered as an organizer
registered.description: You can publish IT competitions and manage events on the platform

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.themeDescription: Switch between light and dark theme

register.title: Organizer Registration
register.description: Fill in your details to get started with the platform
register.headline: New Organizer

roleSelection.title: Tell us about yourself
roleSelection.description: To register as an organizer, you'll need an invite code from a platform administrator.
roleSelection.inviteHint: Don't have an invite code? Contact the platform administrator to request one.

register.description: Fill in your details to start participating in competitions

footer.platformDescription: IT hackathon aggregator and team search platform

cookieBanner.title: We use cookies
cookieBanner.description: This site uses cookies that are required for its operation and authentication. By continuing to use the site, you agree to their use.
cookieBanner.requiredTitle: The site cannot work without cookies
cookieBanner.requiredDescription: DreamTeams requires cookies to work properly — including for authentication and session persistence. Without them, some features are unavailable. Please accept cookies to continue.

home.title: DreamTeams - IT competitions and organizer workflows
home.description: Discover live IT competitions, publish your own events, collect applications through custom forms, and manage participant selection in DreamTeams.
